metrics: Success@k; retention rate; event prediction accuracy; SMAPE
notes: Use long-horizon consistency and clinically meaningful event retention.

metrics: F1-score; precision; recall; Jaccard index; specificity; treatment ranking accuracy
notes: Evaluate recommendation quality and treatment protocol selection.

metrics: C-index; Brier score; calibration error; risk stratification AUC
SSIM; PSNR; LPIPS; FID; expert Turing test
notes: Use expert review because photorealism can hide biological errors.

metrics: Dice; IoU; Hausdorff distance; lesion-wise F1
notes: Separate mask accuracy from image fidelity.

metrics: Navigation error; plane-guidance error; task success rate; path ratio
examples: EchoWorld, Cardiac Copilot, MT World Model

metrics: Policy rank correlation; success/failure classification; rollout fidelity
notes: Compare simulated rollouts against real policy performance.

metrics: DE prediction; perturbation ranking; pathway consistency; mechanism agreement
notes: Prioritize biological plausibility and mechanistic validation.

metrics: Intervention sensitivity; causal consistency; off-policy agreement; uncertainty calibration
notes: Most medical WMs need stronger causal validation.
